# BlueQubit’s Quantum Computing Software
Design, simulate, and run quantum circuits from your browser—no quantum hardware needed.
The simplest way to run quantum programs on CPU / GPU / QPU*
[Get started ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/639acb0f16d4d943650fe023_Arrow-Right.svg)](https://app.bluequbit.io/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/639a4b1bc66c4348c1285c54_Animation_Card.svg)
Platform Access
[Get started ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/639acb0f16d4d943650fe023_Arrow-Right.svg)](https://app.bluequbit.io/)
## Quantum Computing Software Features
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6821fb36e09038924d501f51_Integrated_Quantum_Simulator_Icon.png)
Integrated Quantum Simulator
Run quantum programs on a high-fidelity simulator with up to 40 qubits. You can debug and validate your circuits in a realistic environment before sending them to real quantum hardware.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6821fb369be234b575615cc1_Hardware_Execution_Via_Cloud_Icon.png)
Hardware Execution Via Cloud
Get access to quantum devices directly through our quantum cloud computing software - no need for special hardware. BlueQubit connects your circuits to quantum processors in real time.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6821fb362aada1b4d4423daa_Versioning_and_History_Tracking_Icon.png)
Versioning and Experiment Tracking
Keep track of changes in your quantum circuits with version control and job metadata. You can review past iterations, compare results, and go back to previous states whenever needed.
##  How It Works
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6422335e305acb09861b10d6_Jobs.png)
Step 1
Create an Account
Sign up and choose the pricing plan that suits your needs.
Step 2
Design Your Circuit
Use the platform’s built-in code editor to create your quantum algorithm.
Step 3
Test in Simulator
Debug and refine your circuit using the built-in quantum simulator.
Step 4
Run on Real Quantum Hardware
Submit your job to a live quantum backend via our cloud infrastructure.
Step 5
Visualize and Interpret Results
Use visualization tools to analyze your quantum computation output.
## Access BlueQubit's Cutting-Edge Quantum Algorithms
Unlock powerful quantum capabilities with our suite of production-ready algorithm libraries.
[Quantum Data Loading](https://www.bluequbit.io/platform#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0)[Quantum AI and Machine Learning](https://www.bluequbit.io/platform#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1)[**Quantum-Enhanced Sampling**](https://www.bluequbit.io/platform#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/68501aa0dd0cc3417f39ce60_quantum_data_loading.jpg)
Unlock powerful quantum capabilities with our suite of production-ready algorithm libraries.
[→ Paper on quantum data loaders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10592)[→ Paper on quantum image loading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.10595)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/68501aa0e0bb28230c616663_Quantum%20_AI_and_Machine_Learning.jpg)
Train and evaluate quantum machine learning models at scale. Our advanced algorithms support large-batch training and allow for practical quantum AI workflows.
[→ Paper on quantum image classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.12929)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/68501aa0643e0b8538d0684f_quantum_enhanced_sampling.jpg)
Refine your probabilistic models using our next-gen quantum MCMC techniques developed with DARPA. True quantum randomness will let you go beyond classical limits.
[→ Paper on leveraging GPU simulators and infrastructure](https://www.bluequbit.io/blog/bluequbit-darpa)
## Why Choose BlueQubit
Scalable for Growth
BlueQubit offers flexible pricing plans and infrastructure to support personal projects, collaborative research, or production-scale quantum development. The platform is built to adapt to your workload and grow with your needs.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6840221b51d6c47f57fa6caf_scalable_for_growth.jpg)
No Hardware Needed
Run quantum algorithms without investing in expensive infrastructure. BlueQubit provides access to real quantum processors via the cloud. Just log in, build your circuit, and execute it on real quantum processors—all through your home or office computer.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6840221a31ab375df6e4e736_no_hardware_needed.jpg)
Free Plan Available
Explore quantum computing at no cost with a 34-qubit CPU simulator and basic circuit features. The free plan includes access to tutorials, simulations, and visuals—ideal for beginners, enthusiasts, and early-stage developers looking to test ideas.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6840221a572df0e10442b7bf_free_plan_available.jpg)

## FAQs
### **What is quantum computing software used for?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Quantum computing software is designed to help users create, simulate, and run quantum algorithms on quantum or hybrid systems. It can be especially useful in fields like cryptography, materials science, and machine learning. The technology comes with the tools and interface needed to translate classical problems into quantum logic.
### **Which quantum computing platform is best for beginners?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
The right quantum computing platform for beginners should offer an intuitive interface, learning resources, and quick access to quantum simulators or real hardware. BlueQubit is designed to be accessible, helping new users explore quantum technology without feeling overwhelmed. This makes it easy to start building and testing quantum circuits right away.
### **Can I use quantum computing software without owning a quantum computer?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Yes, most quantum computing platforms, like BlueQubit, provide simulators and cloud access to quantum hardware, so you don’t need to own a quantum computer. These tools let you build and test quantum circuits on classical systems before running them on actual quantum machines. This way, researchers, students, and developers can use quantum technology without specialized hardware.  

### **Is there any free cloud-based quantum computing software available?**
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Yes, several platforms offer free access to cloud-based quantum computing software. BlueQubit, for example, has a free plan that allows users to run simulations, experiment with quantum circuits, and get access to actual quantum backends. It's a great way to start learning and building without financial barriers.
###  **How do quantum cloud computing platforms compare?**  

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Quantum cloud platforms differ in areas like hardware support, development tools, user experience, and pricing. While some may focus on open-source frameworks and community learning, for example, others prioritize enterprise-grade solutions or hybrid quantum-classical workflows. BlueQubit offers a balance of usability and power, with flexible plans and real-time quantum access tailored for a range of users.
